testcase.name: test_create_pipeline_semi_auto_mode

failure.message:
AssertionError: Create failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 in [200, 201] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration18_pipeline.py:137: in test_create_pipeline_semi_auto_mode assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 in [200, 201] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_pipeline_status

error.message: failed on setup with "requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)"

testcase.error:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_iteration18_pipeline.py:167: in auth_headers token = response.json().get("access_token") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
